project_identity.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Archetype 4 (Swiss/Institutional Restraint)
project_identity.vibe: Emotional restraint, cinematic realism, contemplative pacing, philosophical atmosphere, timeless visual storytelling, institutional media language.

typography.strategy: Typography-led — quiet, considered. Mimics criterion collection, MUBI, or an institutional press. Very generous whitespace.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for structural components to let the content breathe.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Avoid heavy card-based UI. Use 1px subtle borders (border-black/10) that form an open, flat grid structure. Think of a ledger or screenplay interface.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align text, use asymmetrical padding. Prioritize optical alignment over geometric precision.

ui_components.strategy: Shadcn/UI components heavily customized for JS files (NOT .tsx). Flat, restrained, no drop-shadows.
ui_components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges or max rounded-sm. Ghost or 1px outline. Solid buttons only for primary actions, using Charcoal #1A1918.
ui_components.panels: Cardless or flat solid with 1px border. No drop shadows. No glassmorphism.
ui_components.timeline_editor: Minimalist tracks. Gray/stone clips. Black-frame pauses explicitly visualized as deep charcoal blocks. Uncluttered.
ui_components.inputs: Underline only or 1px minimal box. No glowing rings, just a darkening of the border on focus.
ui_components.sliders: Used for audio/grading levels. Ultra-thin tracks (1px) with sharp, small thumbs.

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Only fade in, fade out, slow dissolve, crossfade. CSS transitions should target opacity and have 500ms - 1000ms duration (ease-in-out).
motion_and_interactions.hover: Text color darkens. Background shifts slightly. No bouncing, scaling, or spring animations.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Slow fade or minimalist text spinner/progress bar.

media_assets.instructions_to_main_agent: Use the images below for dashboard background accents, landing page heroes, or placeholder media in the timeline. Use exact URLs provided. The frontend uses .js files.
media_assets.icons_strategy: Use `lucide-react` with 1px or 1.25px stroke width. No filled icons. Quiet and precise.

image_urls.description: Macro photography of handmade cream paper texture with subtle charcoal ink smudges
Cinematic film still, slow cinema style, extreme wide shot of a solitary figure walking away in a vast foggy landscape
A foggy field with trees (Cinematic b-roll)
Silhouette of 2 persons standing on grass field during foggy day
Green trees under white sky during daytime

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="timeline-add-clip"`, `data-testid="render-button"`).
